svg.title: Prompt engineering explained
svg.desc: A visual explainer showing the anatomy of a good prompt, the transformation pipeline from raw input to quality output, and five core techniques with examples.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me an example of a weak vs strong prompt')
sendPrompt('What are the key principles of prompt engineering?')
sendPrompt('What makes a high-quality AI output?')
sendPrompt('How do I write a good role in a prompt?')
sendPrompt('How do I write good context in a prompt?')
sendPrompt('How do I write a clear task in a prompt?')
sendPrompt('How do I specify output format in a prompt?')
sendPrompt('Why is this a weak prompt and how do I fix it?')
g.text: No role · no scope · no format

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Break down what makes this a strong prompt')
sendPrompt('Give me an example of role prompting')
sendPrompt('What is few-shot prompting and when should I use it?')
sendPrompt('How do I use constraints effectively in prompts?')
sendPrompt('How do I iterate on prompts to improve them?')
sendPrompt('Which prompt engineering technique should I start with?')
sendPrompt('How do I evaluate AI output quality?')
sendPrompt('What should I look for when evaluating AI output?')
sendPrompt('How do I refine a prompt based on bad output?')
